mnemonics.title: Array Properties
mnemonics.content: CARS: Contiguous, Access Random, Size fixed

mnemonics.title: Linked List Types
mnemonics.content: Silly Dogs Chase Balls: SLL, DLL, CLL, BLL (Bidirectional)

acronyms.usage: Basic linked list with single direction traversal

visualTips.visualization: Imagine flipping arrows between nodes while moving 3 pointers
Picture moving elements to new larger container when full

analogies.analogy: Like apartment building - fixed number of rooms in sequence
Train cars connected by couplings - each car independent but linked
